summary: Completed comprehensive testing of QuizHub NEW GAME FLOW rewrite - verified all major game flow changes, backend APIs, frontend integration, and WebSocket functionality. All new requirements are working correctly.
passed_tests: GET /api/health returns JSON status ok with version 1.0.0 and player_count
POST /api/join creates player with valid nickname and returns player_id
POST /api/admin/auth with PIN '1234' returns admin token
NEW FLOW: POST /api/game/start returns status 'countdown' (not 'question' immediately)
NEW FLOW: After 10 seconds, game auto-transitions to first question (server-side timer)
NEW FLOW: POST /api/answer records answer and returns {recorded: true} (NOT correct/wrong)
NEW FLOW: POST /api/game/next only works in 'reveal' state, returns 400 otherwise
NEW FLOW: GET /api/game/state returns correct_answer only in 'reveal' state
NEW FLOW: GET /api/game/state does NOT show correct_answer in question state
GET /api/leaderboard returns sorted player entries with ranks
POST /api/game/reset clears everything and returns status 'reset'
WebSocket /api/ws endpoint accepts connections without errors
Frontend Player: Join screen shows nickname input and Join button
Frontend Player: After join, shows lobby with 'Waiting for host' (NO Start Game button)
Frontend Player: NO Start Game button confirmed for players (new requirement)
Frontend Player: Question screen shows question + options + timer (NO Next button)
Frontend Player: Timer shows 'Time's up!' when expired
Frontend Player: Correct answer highlighted after time expires
Frontend Player: Shows 'Waiting for host to advance' message (new requirement)
Frontend Player: Game over shows personal rank (NOT full leaderboard)
Frontend Admin: PIN screen -> dashboard with player list and Start Game button
Frontend Admin: Start Game triggers 10-sec countdown (new requirement)
Frontend Admin: Countdown shows 'Game Starting!' with player count
Frontend Admin: WebSocket status shows 'Connected' with green dot
Frontend Admin: All admin controls working (timer config, player management, question bank)
WebSocket: Stable connections, no Hijacker errors, real-time updates working

success_percentage.new_game_flow: 100% (all 7 major game flow changes implemented correctly)
success_percentage.admin_features: 100% (PIN auth, game controls, countdown, question management)
success_percentage.player_experience: 100% (no control buttons, reactive to admin actions, correct messaging)
